case_title: ZAMECKI,ROBERT J. VS COLTON CAPITAL CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED LETTER TO DAVID COLTON C/O COLTON CAPITAL GROUP RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,395.02 FILED BY ZAMECKI,ROBERT J. AS TO DEFENDANT COLTON CAPITAL CORP. COLTON,DAVID A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAMECKI,ROBERT J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLTON CAPITAL CORP. $1,395.02 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,415.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CHALLENGE OF VENUE TO IRVINE FILED.
